description_long: This coupe car features a sporty, aggressive design with a low-slung body, wide stance, and oversized red wheels with visible suspension components. The exterior is finished in a matte blue color, accented by a large rear spoiler in red and silver, and a prominent hood scoop with triple air intakes. The front end showcases sharp, angular headlights and a distinctive vertical grille, while the rear is dominated by the wide spoiler and dual seats visible through the open cabin. The interior includes two white bucket seats, a minimalist dashboard, and a racing-style steering wheel. The car's open-top design and exposed mechanical elements suggest a high-performance, track-oriented vehicle, likely inspired by modern racing or concept cars.
description: A sporty blue coupe car with oversized red wheels, a large rear spoiler, and an open-top design featuring two white bucket seats. The car has aggressive styling, visible suspension, and racing-inspired details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the aggressive grille, triple hood scoop, sharp headlights, and wide stance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the open cabin, large red wheels, visible suspension, and the prominent rear spoiler.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wide red spoiler, dual white seats, and the open cockpit layout.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with clear visibility of the suspension, wheels, and open interior.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
